metadata.title: Story Outline Generator: Turn a Vague Idea Into a Usable Plot
metadata.description: Turn one idea into a structured story outline — premise, core conflict, arc, and key beats in seconds. Expand to chapters when ready. Free, no sign-up.
metadata.keywords: story outline generator, plot outline generator, ai story outline, chapter outline generator, writing outline tool

ui.title: Story Outline Generator
ui.subtitle: Turn a vague story idea into a structured outline you can actually write, then expand it into chapters when you are ready.
ui.story_idea_placeholder: e.g. A shy village healer discovers she can talk to ghosts.
ui.empty_output: Describe your story idea, then generate to see a premise, conflict, arc, and key beats here.
ui.no_credits_title: You need credits to expand this outline
ui.no_credits_description: Free outline generation stays open, but chapter expansion is a paid next step.

validation.story_idea_required: Tell us your story idea first.

errors.expand_failed: Failed to expand outline into chapters.

random_prompts: A shy village healer discovers she can talk to ghosts.
Two rival treasure divers must team up to survive a sinking city.
A burned-out wedding photographer accidentally captures proof that time is looping.

feature1.name: feature_intro
feature1.label: Overview
feature1.title: What This Story Outline Generator Actually Helps You Do
feature1.description: Get enough structure to start writing without being forced into a heavyweight planning workflow.

items.title: Start from one sentence
items.description: Bring a premise, a mood, or a character idea and turn it into a usable story direction.

items.title: See the core conflict clearly
items.description: Get a tighter grasp on goal, opposition, stakes, and urgency before you draft scenes.

items.title: Expand only when ready
items.description: Move from outline to chapter plan only after the direction feels worth continuing.

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Use the Story Outline Generator
how_to_use.description: Go from vague idea to a writeable structure in minutes.

items.title: Describe the story seed
items.description: Enter one clear idea and choose a few light preferences like genre and tone.

items.title: Review the outline
items.description: Check the premise, core conflict, story arc, and key beats.

items.title: Expand into chapters
items.description: Turn a promising outline into a chapter-by-chapter plan when you want a stronger drafting scaffold.

feature2.name: feature_benefits
feature2.label: Benefits
feature2.title: Why New Writers Use the Story Outline Generator
feature2.description: It reduces the blank-page problem without overengineering your process.

items.title: Low friction
items.description: You do not need a full story bible before the tool becomes useful.

items.title: Clearer structure
items.description: You leave with beats and escalation, not just a vague paragraph.

items.title: Natural next step
items.description: If the outline works, chapter expansion gives you a practical drafting bridge.

feature3.name: use_cases
feature3.label: Use Cases
feature3.title: Best Uses for the Story Outline Generator
feature3.description: For writers who have an idea but need a stronger structure before drafting.

items.title: Testing a premise quickly
items.description: See whether a story idea has enough conflict and escalation to carry a narrative.

items.title: Breaking through writer's block
items.description: Turn a stuck concept into concrete beats you can work from.

items.title: Starting a first draft with more confidence
items.description: Use chapter expansion when you want a more actionable writing plan.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Story Outline Generator FAQ
faq.description: Common questions about using the tool.

items.title: Is the story outline generator free?
items.description: You can generate an outline for free. Chapter expansion is the paid continuation step.

items.title: Do I need an account before generating an outline?
items.description: No. You only need to sign in when you want to continue into chapter expansion.

items.title: Who is this tool for?
items.description: It is best for new and inspiration-led writers who want structure without a heavy planning workflow.

cta.name: cta
cta.label: CTA
cta.title: Ready to Keep Writing?
cta.description: Generate a story outline, then expand the direction that feels worth finishing.
